Oracle Events
- Search for emails related to BrightLoop Analytics - Simone Richter apartment mismatch, Marcus Webb vehicle delay, Julian Brooks and Blessing Okafor actions, and Tessa Moreno's expansion request - to find active threads, service recovery correspondence, Blessing's missed Road Runner delay email, and Tessa's six-move expansion scoping.
- Search for emails related to StormCloud Analytics - Liam Park's escalation, Jae-won Kim's lease guarantor, Simone Richter's (StormCloud) reimbursement freeze, and Ridgeline Robotics referral - to find the recovery plan, guarantor correspondence, reimbursement freeze thread, and referral chain. Include a SENT folder search to verify whether the guarantor packet was actually sent after Mina's April 9 commitment.
- Search Slack for BrightLoop and StormCloud discussions to find capacity escalations, Ridgeline referral celebration, stipend hold discussions between Mina and Marcus in #finance, and guarantor status updates.
- Search Linear for BrightLoop issues to discover issue #412 (linear_issue_c16357d188c6, Julian/Blessing service failures) and issue #417 (linear_issue_f85be674c9b8, "Document BrightLoop ops gaps").
- Search Linear for StormCloud issues to discover linear_issue_c97359216490 ("StormCloud Relocation – Jae-won Kim – SEA -> AUS," falsely closed by Suki on April 10), linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0 ("Follow up with Jae-won Kim on requested Austin lease documents," Omar's low-priority triage), and linear_issue_a49b4d199139 ("StormCloud account incident reconstruction," cross-functional reconstruction issue opened April 24).
- Read Linear comments on discovered issues to find Julian's takeover (linear_comment_49eca9beab06), Blessing's admission (linear_comment_9a6b9e55f19e), Julian's UrbanNest outreach (linear_comment_dca3b974b53b), Suki's diversion (linear_comment_1405edd1a572), Julian's credit approval (linear_comment_65243eedc4dc), Marcus's credit error (linear_comment_1f5055f550ea), and Chloe's audit (linear_comment_97dfa287bd32).
- Search CRM for BrightLoop and StormCloud company records and list existing engagements to identify company IDs (company_brightloop, company_stormcloud) for engagement logging and discover the overstated BrightLoop engagement note (engagement_brightloop_apr2026_relocations).
- Search CRM for Ridgeline Robotics to discover the company record (crm_company_d07c0ec27cf2), lead (crm_lead_de04045463c3), and deal (crm_deal_a95b4721982a) created by David Chen on April 24, confirming the referral was followed up on.
- Discover the Airtable base and table structure using airtable_list_bases and airtable_list_tables with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001" to identify available tables (Relocations, Stipend Transactions, Client Accounts) and their field schemas.
- Search the Airtable Relocations table for BrightLoop records to find Simone Richter (In Progress), Marcus Webb (In Progress), Jordan Whitfield (In Progress), and Preethi Nair (In Progress).
- Search the Airtable Relocations table for StormCloud records to find Jae-won Kim's record (recJaeWonKimStormCloudAustin) corrected to "In Progress."
- Search or list Airtable Stipend Transactions records to discover Jordan Ekwueme's $45 monitor stand stipend (rec_stipend_jordan_monitor_stand) on admin hold with audit flag "PDF Template Match." Simone Richter's (StormCloud) $340 standing desk reimbursement is not in Airtable - it is discovered via emails and Slack.
- Search QuickBooks for StormCloud invoices to discover INV-2026-002 ($26,400) as the only StormCloud invoice, confirming the $500 credit is not on a live invoice.
- Look up Tessa Moreno's contact details using contacts_search_contacts to discover tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com as the recipient email for the status update.
- Create a CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) for BrightLoop with company_ids including "company_brightloop," documenting the two unresolved April batch failures (Simone apartment mismatch, Marcus vehicle delay) and noting the existing engagement overstates completion.
- Create a CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) for StormCloud with company_ids including "company_stormcloud," documenting recovery plan follow-through: Jae-won guarantor not sent, $500 credit on wrong document, Simone reimbursement frozen, Ridgeline referral recovered.
- Create a Linear issue (via linear_create_issue) for the unresolved BrightLoop items - title references Simone Richter and Marcus Webb service recovery, priority High.
- Send an email (via send_email) from mina.hashimoto@moveops.com to tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com with a BrightLoop status update covering Simone's apartment mismatch, Marcus's vehicle delay, and expansion scoping context.
- Report comprehensive findings to Mina in the final response covering all BrightLoop open items (Simone apartment, Marcus vehicle, Julian/Blessing actions, Ekwueme stipend, Whitfield/Nair status, CRM overstatement), StormCloud recovery verification (Jae-won guarantor, $500 credit, Simone reimbursement, Ridgeline referral), and disambiguation of the two Simone Richters.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
